Package org.springdoc.core.utils

Class StringUtils

java.lang.Object
org.springdoc.core.utils.StringUtils
public final class StringUtils extends Object
Utility methods for String operations.

Replaces methods from org.springdoc.core.utils.StringUtils that don't have equivalents in the Spring Framework or Java standard library. All methods are null-safe and follow commons-lang3 contracts.

  • Method Details

    • isEmpty

      public static boolean isEmpty(CharSequence cs)
      Checks if a CharSequence is empty (null or length zero).
      Parameters:
      cs - the CharSequence to check, may be null
      Returns:
      true if the CharSequence is empty or null

    • isNotEmpty

      public static boolean isNotEmpty(CharSequence cs)
      Checks if a CharSequence is not empty (not null and not zero length).
      Parameters:
      cs - the CharSequence to check, may be null
      Returns:
      true if the CharSequence is not empty and not null

    • isBlank

      public static boolean isBlank(CharSequence cs)
      Checks if a CharSequence is blank (null, empty, or whitespace-only).
      Parameters:
      cs - the CharSequence to check, may be null
      Returns:
      true if the CharSequence is blank or null

    • isNotBlank

      public static boolean isNotBlank(CharSequence cs)
      Checks if a CharSequence is not blank (not null, not empty, not whitespace-only).
      Parameters:
      cs - the CharSequence to check, may be null
      Returns:
      true if the CharSequence is not blank and not null

    • defaultIfEmpty

      public static String defaultIfEmpty(String str, String defaultStr)
      Returns either the passed CharSequence, or if the CharSequence is empty or null, the value of defaultStr.
      Parameters:
      str - the CharSequence to test, may be null
      defaultStr - the default CharSequence to return, may be null
      Returns:
      the passed CharSequence if not empty, else the default

    • defaultIfBlank

      public static String defaultIfBlank(String str, String defaultStr)
      Returns either the passed CharSequence, or if the CharSequence is blank or null, the value of defaultStr.
      Parameters:
      str - the CharSequence to test, may be null
      defaultStr - the default CharSequence to return, may be null
      Returns:
      the passed CharSequence if not blank, else the default

    • contains

      public static boolean contains(String str, CharSequence search)
      Checks if CharSequence contains a search CharSequence, handling null.
      Parameters:
      str - the CharSequence to check, may be null
      search - the CharSequence to find, may be null
      Returns:
      true if the str contains the search CharSequence, false if null input

    • capitalize

      public static String capitalize(String str)
      Capitalizes a String, changing the first character to upper case.
      Parameters:
      str - the String to capitalize, may be null
      Returns:
      the capitalized String, or null if null input

    • substringAfterLast

      public static String substringAfterLast(String str, String separator)
      Gets the substring after the last occurrence of a separator.
      Parameters:
      str - the String to get a substring from, may be null
      separator - the String to search for, may be null
      Returns:
      the substring after the last occurrence of the separator, or the original string if the separator doesn't exist

    • containsAny

      public static boolean containsAny(CharSequence cs, CharSequence... searchStrings)
      Checks if CharSequence contains any of the given search strings.
      Parameters:
      cs - the CharSequence to check, may be null
      searchStrings - the CharSequences to search for, may be null or empty
      Returns:
      true if any of the search strings is found, false if null input
